game_name: Last Battle: Legend of the Final Hero

special_mechanics.name: Power-Up Meter
special_mechanics.description: Aarzak has a power-up meter that gradually fills as he defeats enemies. When the meter reaches a certain point (depending on the stage), the character transforms into a super-powered state, allowing rapid punches and kicks for the rest of the stage.

special_mechanics.name: Time Limit Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Most levels feature a time limit displayed in the lower-right corner. Instead of instant death when time reaches zero, the time limit gradually drains the player's life gauge until the level is completed.

special_mechanics.name: Combat States
special_mechanics.description: Player can attack while standing, jumping, and crouching, for a total of six basic attacks.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Source material is a Wikipedia article focused on game history, licensing, and reception rather than technical physics parameters. No movement speeds, gravity values, or sub-pixel system information is documented. Game received poor reviews citing awkward controls and simplistic gameplay.
